title: HypurrCo AMA Series: Timeswap Labs & it’s upcoming Fjord Sale
summary_title: TimeSwap's oracle-less lending arrives on HyperEVM with 50% community token allocation
summary_description: TimeSwap co-founders discuss their fixed-term lending protocol, $20M FDV token sale, and V3 roadmap.

key_moments.label: Introduction to TimeSwap and upcoming token sale details
Amit and Rickson introduce TimeSwap's oracle-less design and history
How TimeSwap operates without oracles using AMM mechanics
Token sale announcement: $20M FDV, 10% community allocation, launching Friday
Token distribution: 50% community, 20% team, 15% investors, 15% treasury
TimeSwap V3 vision: unified liquidity for all fixed-term financial products
Rickson explains V3's three innovations: architecture, capital efficiency, and maturity pooling
Why HyperEVM matters: meritocratic ecosystem with strong builder community
